name: Tadalafil improved ED-linked satisfaction and SEAR psychosocial measures in Seftel 2009
statement: In men with ED, tadalafil 5 mg once daily improved treatment and sexual satisfaction and SEAR domains including sexual relationship, confidence, self-esteem, and overall relationship versus placebo, but the abstract reports these improvements correlated with erectile-function improvement.
population_or_context: Men with erectile dysfunction; indirect for healthy men age 30 to 50.
quantitative_note: Treatment satisfaction domain scores were 75 and 73 for tadalafil-treated participants and partners versus 51 and 55 for placebo, P<0.001; SEAR and satisfaction outcomes improved versus placebo, P<0.001.

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Abstract reports SEAR and satisfaction improvements and correlation with IIEF-EF score change.

caveats: Population had ED rather than being healthy enhancement users.
Psychosocial improvements appear tied to improved erectile function.
Full-text extraction was not completed for this first baseline.
population_profile: Men with erectile dysfunction; no direct evidence for healthy men age 30 to 50.
tadalafil_exposure: Tadalafil 5 mg once daily for 12 weeks.
indication_context: On-label ED treatment; indirect off-label mood/well-being evidence.
endpoint_measure: Treatment satisfaction domain of Sexual Life Quality Questionnaire; Self-Esteem And Relationship questionnaire; IIEF satisfaction domains; sexual encounter profile satisfaction questions.
effect_estimate: Tadalafil improved treatment/sexual satisfaction and SEAR outcomes versus placebo, with P<0.001 for reported comparisons.
safety_findings: Abstract does not provide detailed adverse-event extraction; safety caveats must come from the published safety baseline.
directness_to_target_population: Low directness because the effects were measured in ED patients and were linked to erectile-function improvement.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Sexual-function improvement is a likely mediator and prevents interpreting this as a direct mood or general well-being effect.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence; no PDE5 class transfer needed, but endpoint transfer is limited to ED-linked psychosocial outcomes.
